comparison_prompt.description: Tests async Python, Pydantic v2, error handling — good for cost comparison
comparison_prompt.text:
Write a production-ready Python async function that:
- Fetches data from 3 APIs concurrently using httpx
- Implements retry logic with exponential backoff
- Returns structured results using Pydantic v2
- Includes comprehensive error handling

Include type hints, docstrings, and explain trade-offs.
